title: Auburn BMX
summary: Published brand profile documenting Auburn’s origin, modular-frame development, ownership history, production eras, rider list and Lititz BMX holdings.

facts.label: Original concept
facts.value: Developed as a Honda proposal before adoption of the Auburn name

qualification_notes: Uncertain measurements, model-year interpretations and relaunch controversy are preserved as source-qualified observations rather than resolved facts.
The Lititz BMX holdings paragraph is a collection-status statement and remains separate from the brand-history record.
